description:
The quiz assesses advanced JavaScript error‑handling knowledge, covering tricky serialization bugs, cross‑context instanceof issues, and nuanced try‑catch scenarios. It is positioned at a challenging level, using a tone that is both motivating and slightly irreverent to push seasoned developers toward deeper mastery.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, Serialization pitfalls, Cross‑context instanceof behavior, Advanced try‑catch patterns, Debugging and diagnostics
Audience: Intermediate to senior JavaScript developers who want to benchmark and sharpen their error‑handling expertise.
